chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1735 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7479/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7480/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Saifullah Soomro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel does not press this petition and submits that he would avail remedy as per law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy before the proper forum, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
